mayor.title: Mayor of Harbor Town
responsibilities: Oversee all civic affairs
Declare martial law in emergencies
Approve major expenditures
Appoint and dismiss officials

guard_captain.title: Captain of the Harbor Guard
responsibilities: Maintain law and order
Command the town guard
Issue bounties for criminals
Organize patrols

harbormaster.title: Harbormaster
responsibilities: Regulate port traffic
Collect docking fees
Enforce trade regulations
Inspect cargo for contraband

magistrate.title: Town Magistrate
responsibilities: Preside over trials
Determine sentences
Interpret town law
Mediate disputes

tax_collector.title: Royal Tax Collector
responsibilities: Collect taxes from merchants
Assess property values
Report to the crown treasury
Enforce tariffs

temple_prior.title: Prior of the Harbor Temple
responsibilities: Oversee religious ceremonies
Provide sanctuary to the persecuted
Counsel the mayor on moral matters
Maintain the temple grounds

guild_master.title: Master of the Merchant Guild
responsibilities: Regulate trade within town
Set fair market prices
Represent merchant interests
Organize trade caravans

thane.title: Thane of the Mountain Hold
responsibilities: Rule the hold with the authority of the ancestors
Settle disputes between clans
Declare war or forge alliances
Oversee all mining and forging operations

forge_master.title: Master of the Great Forge
responsibilities: Oversee all smithing operations
Maintain quality standards for arms and armor
Train apprentice smiths

mine_overseer.title: Overseer of the Deep Mines
responsibilities: Manage all mining operations
Ensure miner safety in the deep shafts

runekeeper.title: Runekeeper of the Ancestral Halls
responsibilities: Preserve the ancient rune-lore
Ward the hold against magical threats
Inscribe protective runes on arms and walls
Counsel the Thane on arcane matters

vault_guardian.title: Guardian of the Mountain Vault
responsibilities: Protect the treasury and precious ore reserves

Inventory all stored wealth

trade_envoy.title: Trade Envoy to the Surface
responsibilities: Negotiate trade agreements with surface towns
Arrange ore and goods exchanges
Represent dwarven interests abroad
Manage caravan logistics

clan_elder.title: Elder of the Council of Clans
responsibilities: Advise the Thane on matters of tradition
Mediate inter-clan disputes
Preserve oral histories and lineages
Preside over clan ceremonies

war_commander.title: Commander of the Hold Guard
responsibilities: Command the hold's military forces
Organize defense of the gates and tunnels
Train warriors for battle
Lead sorties against invaders

tunnel_warden.title: Warden of the Deep Tunnels
responsibilities: Patrol the deep tunnels for threats
Maintain tunnel infrastructure

ale_master.title: Master Brewer of the Mountain Hold
responsibilities: Brew and maintain ale stores for the hold
Manage the great fermentation halls

stone_mason.title: Chief Mason of the Hold
responsibilities: Maintain structural integrity of the hold
Oversee construction of new halls and passages
Repair fortifications after sieges
Train apprentice masons

elder_druid.title: Elder Druid of Forest Haven
responsibilities: Commune with the ancient trees for guidance

ranger_captain.title: Captain of the Woodland Rangers
responsibilities: Patrol the forest borders

grove_keeper.title: Keeper of the Sacred Grove
responsibilities: Tend the sacred grove and its ancient trees
Perform seasonal rituals of renewal
Guard against blight and dark magic

moonwatcher.title: Moonwatcher of the Silver Canopy
responsibilities: Read omens in the stars and moonlight
Maintain the starlight wards

beast_speaker.title: Beast Speaker of the Wild Court
responsibilities: Communicate with the forest creatures
Negotiate truces with predator packs
Train animal companions for the rangers
Monitor migration and herd movements

herb_master.title: Master Herbalist of the Green Pharmacy
responsibilities: Prepare healing poultices and tonics
Maintain the herb gardens and drying sheds
Train apprentice herbalists
Supply medicines for the settlement

arrow_smith.title: Arrow Smith of the Haven Armory
responsibilities: Craft arrows, bows, and light armaments
Maintain the settlement's weapon stores
Supply rangers with quality ammunition

lore_keeper.title: Keeper of the Leaf-Bound Lore
responsibilities: Preserve the ancient scrolls and song-tales

border_warden.title: Warden of the Forest Borders

Maintain the boundary wards and markers

spirit_caller.title: Spirit Caller of the Ancestral Glade
responsibilities: Commune with the spirits of the fallen
Perform rites of passage and remembrance
Seek wisdom from ancestral shades

tree_singer.title: Tree Singer of the Living Walls
responsibilities: Coax the trees to form living fortifications

vizier.title: Grand Vizier of the Outpost

bazaar_master.title: Master of the Grand Bazaar
responsibilities: Regulate trade in the grand bazaar
Resolve merchant disputes and pricing conflicts
Collect stall fees and trade taxes
Ensure fair weights and measures

water_warden.title: Warden of the Sacred Waters

Maintain the aqueducts and cisterns

caravan_master.title: Master of the Caravan Routes
responsibilities: Organize and schedule trade caravans
Negotiate safe passage with desert tribes

sand_rider_captain.title: Captain of the Sand Riders

Defend caravans from raiders and beasts

scribe.title: Chief Scribe of the Outpost Archives
responsibilities: Record all edicts, contracts, and judgments
Maintain the archive of trade records

oasis_keeper.title: Keeper of the Verdant Oasis
responsibilities: Tend the gardens and date groves of the oasis

spice_merchant.title: Chief Spice Merchant of the Outpost
responsibilities: Control the rare spice trade

Maintain connections with distant suppliers

astrologer.title: Royal Astrologer of the Dunes
responsibilities: Read the stars to predict sandstorms and omens

elder.title: Elder of the Swamp Village
responsibilities: Lead the village through consensus and wisdom

bog_warden.title: Warden of the Black Bog

herbalist.title: Herbalist of the Marsh Apothecary

fish_master.title: Fish Master of the Stilted Docks

ferryman.title: Chief Ferryman of the Marsh Crossings

swamp_guide.title: Guide of the Trackless Mire

witch_doctor.title: Witch Doctor of the Spirit Fires

net_mender.title: Chief Net Mender of the Village

spirit_ward.title: Spirit Ward of the Outer Paths

marsh_hunter.title: Chief Hunter of the Marshlands

Train young hunters in swamp survival

reed_weaver.title: Master Reed Weaver
responsibilities: Weave reeds into baskets, roofing, and walls

sheriff.title: Sheriff of the Plains Crossing
responsibilities: Maintain order at the crossroads

Enforce the laws of the wider realm
Organize posses to pursue outlaws

stable_master.title: Master of the Crossroads Stables

responsibilities: Negotiate contracts between caravans and guards

Maintain a registry of available goods

bounty_board_keeper.title: Keeper of the Bounty Board

fence_master.title: Fence Master of the Stockyards

courier_chief.title: Chief Courier of the Crossroads

responsibilities: Tend the roadside wayshrine and chapel

commander.title: Commander of the Coastal Fort

responsibilities: Design and maintain fortifications

scout_master.title: Scout Master of the Coastal Patrol

medic_chief.title: Chief Medic of the Fort Infirmary
responsibilities: Treat wounded soldiers and civilians

responsibilities: Maintain the signal fires and flag systems

prison_warden.title: Warden of the Sea Cells

supply_officer.title: Supply Officer of the Coastal Fort
responsibilities: Coordinate supply shipments from allied ports

pit_foreman.title: Foreman of the Main Pit
responsibilities: Supervise daily mining operations

Maintain the trail between camp and town

Maintain the cookhouse and mess hall

claim_registrar.title: Registrar of Mining Claims

security_chief.title: Chief of Camp Security

responsibilities: Survey new areas for mineral deposits

shaft_engineer.title: Engineer of the Mine Shafts

lamp_boy_chief.title: Chief of the Lamp Boys
responsibilities: Manage the lamp boy crews who light the mines

high_priest.title: High Priest of the Temple Sanctuary

inquisitor.title: Inquisitor of the Faithful

scribe_monk.title: Head Scribe Monk of the Scriptorium

choir_master.title: Choir Master of the Golden Choir

alms_distributor.title: Distributor of Alms and Charity

shrine_guardian.title: Guardian of the Inner Shrine

pilgrimage_guide.title: Guide of the Sacred Pilgrimage

bell_ringer.title: Keeper of the Temple Bells
responsibilities: Ring the bells for services and emergencies

warden.title: Warden of the Frontier Post
responsibilities: Command the frontier outpost and all personnel

scout_captain.title: Captain of the Frontier Scouts
responsibilities: Lead long-range scouting expeditions
Map uncharted territories beyond the post

trapper_chief.title: Chief Trapper of the Frontier
responsibilities: Manage trapping operations in the wilds

signal_keeper.title: Keeper of the Frontier Signals
responsibilities: Maintain the signal fire and mirror relay

supply_master.title: Supply Master of the Frontier Post
responsibilities: Manage all food, water, and supply stores
Requisition goods from the nearest settlements
Track consumption and forecast supply needs

prisoner_guard.title: Guard of the Frontier Stockade
responsibilities: Guard prisoners held at the frontier post

map_maker.title: Cartographer of the Frontier
responsibilities: Chart the wilderness beyond the frontier
Update maps with new discoveries and dangers
Record terrain features for military planning

beast_handler.title: Beast Handler of the Frontier Kennels

wall_engineer.title: Engineer of the Frontier Walls

lookout_chief.title: Chief Lookout of the Watchtowers
responsibilities: Coordinate the watchtower rotation schedule

cook_master.title: Cook Master of the Frontier Post

murder.desc: Guard Captain orders an investigation into the killing.
Guard Captain issues a bounty for the killer.
Guard Captain orders immediate arrest of any suspects.
Mayor declares martial law following the murders.

theft.desc: Guards begin an investigation into the theft.
Guard Captain issues a bounty for the rogue.
Guard Captain orders sweep of known hideouts.

riot.desc: Guard Captain institutes an evening curfew.
Guard Captain orders arrest of ringleaders.
Mayor declares martial law to quell the riot.
Mayor orders exile of riot instigators.

trade_disruption.desc: Guild Master sets emergency price floors to prevent gouging.
Harbormaster enforces strict rationing and price controls.

desecration.desc: Temple Prior offers sanctuary and prayers for cleansing.
Magistrate orders arrest of the desecrators.
Magistrate sentences desecrators to permanent exile.
Mayor declares state of emergency after temple desecration.

invasion.desc: Guard Captain establishes curfew and doubles patrols.
Guard Captain offers bounty on enemy scouts.
Mayor declares martial law and mobilizes militia.
Mayor declares total war footing. All citizens conscripted.

effects: Merchant guild attempts to fill power vacuum
